creator: freebsd@simweb.ch
text:
Ubiquiti has released UniFi (beta) 3.1.9 which fixes a couple of known issues found between beta releases.

The announcement and changelog can be found at:
http://community.ubnt.com/t5/UniFi-Beta/UniFi-3-1-9-beta-is-Released/m-p/662151#U662151 (as of writing not publicly visible, requireS beta registration)

Though Ubiquiti emphasizes that 3.1.9 is still considered beta and shouldn't be used in production please thus please have a look at PR ports/185000.

Thank you for your work! :-)

Fix: I've made the following changes to my poudriere ports tree compared to the default one:

PORTNAME=      unifi
-PORTVERSION=   3.1.6
+PORTVERSION=   3.1.9
 CATEGORIES=    net-mgmt java
 MASTER_SITES=  http://dl.ubnt.com/unifi/${PORTVERSION}/
 DISTNAME=      UniFi.unix
